title: Memorandum Order No. 621-a, s. 1978
text:
Office of the President of the Philippines Malacañang

MEMORANDUM ORDER NO. 621-A

The temporary detail and designation of the government personnel listed, hereunder, effective upon entrance to duty, to Constitute the Skeletal Work Force of the Batasang Pambansa which shall provide the requisite technical, staff and clerical services for the Batasan, is hereby authorized, to wit:

BILLS AND INDEX DIVISION 3rd Reading Section

(Vice Elpidio Tugawen)

He shall perform the duties and discharge the responsibilities of the position indicated opposite his name based on the Plantilla of Personnel of the Batasan Secretariat.

He shall be entitled to honoraria in the amount equivalent to thirty-five percent (35%) of his basic salary chargeable against the Batasan funds, subject to the usual accounting and auditing procedures.

By Authority of the President:

(Sgd.) JUAN C. TUVERA Presidential Assistant

Manila, July 16, 1978

Source: Malacañang Records Office
